en.title: You are not authorised to view this case
en.heading: You are not authorised to view this case
en.line1: The reference number you entered exists, but you do not have permission to access it.
en.bullet1: the case belongs to someone else
en.bullet2: you are using a different account
en.line3: You can try another reference number or contact support if you think this is a mistake.

cy.title: Nid ydych wedi'ch awdurdodi i weld yr achos hwn

cy.line1: Mae'r rhif cyfeirnod rydych wedi'i nodi yn bodoli, ond nid oes gennych ganiatâd i'w weld.
cy.bullet1: mae'r achos yn perthyn i rywun arall
cy.line3: Gallwch roi cynnig ar rif cyfeirnod arall neu gysylltu â chymorth os ydych yn credu mai camgymeriad yw hyn.
